brand.name: Glenda Timola
brand.title: Real Estate Professional
brand.tagline: Helping you find the perfect home in Cebu — with trust, expertise, and a personal touch.

cream.role: Section backgrounds, soft dividers, card borders

taupe.role: Body text, secondary labels, muted elements

display.usage: Headings, hero titles, section headers, price display

body.usage: Paragraphs, descriptions, nav links, all body copy

navbar.logo: Glenda Timola in font-display, fades in on scroll
navbar.desktop-links: Hidden until scroll, text-taupe hover:text-navy, uppercase tracking-wide
navbar.mobile-menu: Fixed overlay, bg-navy/80 scrim, bg-white slide-in panel from right, animate-slide-in (0.3s)

hero.parallax: translateY(offset) via requestAnimationFrame, positive direction (image moves down)
hero.layout: Centered text stack with CTA button

listing-card.breakpoints: Responsive grid: < lg blog-style stacked, md+ image+text side-by-side, lg+ 3-column card grid
listing-card.desktop: bg-white border border-cream rounded-xl, hover:shadow, aspect-[4/3] thumbnail, p-5 content
listing-card.mobile: Article flow with gold status line, title, capped thumbnail (max-w-md), specs, View Details link

highlight-card.style: Glassmorphism on navy: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/10 rounded-xl hover:bg-white/10
highlight-card.layout: 3-column grid (md:2, lg:3), aspect-[4/3] thumbnail, p-5 content
highlight-card.elements: Date pill (bg-gold/20 text-gold), title in white, description line-clamp-2, reference links

carousel.container: bg-[#1a1a1a] rounded-xl aspect-[16/9] flex items-center justify-center
carousel.nav: bg-white/90 hover:bg-white text-navy p-2 rounded-full, left/right positioned
carousel.dots: flex gap-2, active: bg-gold w-5 rounded-full, inactive: bg-white/60 w-2 rounded-full
carousel.fullscreen: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/95, close top-right, nav arrows bottom counter

timeline.line: absolute left-[19px] w-0.5 bg-gradient-to-b from-gold via-gold/40 to-transparent
timeline.nodes: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-navy border-2 border-gold with star icon, shadow glow
timeline.content: pl-14, article flow with gold date line, blog-style headings and image carousel

buttons.primary: bg-gold text-navy font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-gold/90 uppercase tracking-wide text-sm
buttons.outline-gold: border-2 border-gold text-gold rounded-lg hover:bg-gold hover:text-navy uppercase tracking-wide text-sm
buttons.outline-navy: border-2 border-navy text-navy rounded-lg hover:bg-navy hover:text-white uppercase tracking-wide text-sm
buttons.pill: bg-gold/20 text-gold text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full uppercase tracking-wide

contact.form: White card with cream borders, focus ring navy/20
contact.info-blocks: Icon + text rows, each with unique accent color (green for phone, indigo for email, blue for Facebook, orange for location)

layout.max-width: max-w-6xl (1280px) for sections, max-w-4xl (1024px) for blog/timeline content

patterns.mobile-blog-desktop-grid: FeaturedListings: < lg = stacked blog articles, lg+ = 3-column cards
patterns.hidden-timeline-mobile: HighlightsPage: timeline line/nodes hidden on mobile, full-width content
patterns.image-left-md: FeaturedListings md-layout: image left (w-56), text right

animation.parallax: Hero image translates on scroll with requestAnimationFrame
animation.hover-zoom: Card thumbnails scale(1.05) on hover, 0.5s ease
animation.hover-image-zoom: Carousel/blog images scale(1.02) on hover, 0.7s ease
animation.slide-in: Mobile panel slides from right (translateX(100%) → 0, 0.3s ease-out)
animation.nav-transition: Background color transition 0.5s duration on scroll

content.architecture: All content in data/*.json files, no CMS
content.images: Hosted on HubSpot CDN (hubspotusercontent-na2.net), uploaded via API, PUBLIC_NOT_INDEXABLE
content.feature-toggles: sections.json enables/disables sections and listingSpecs without code changes
content.seo: OG tags via vite transformIndexHtml (home) + react-helmet-async (per-page), sitemap auto-generated at build
content.social: Facebook contact link in info blocks

motion-design-language.ethos: Subtle, luxury, restrained — no flashy animations. Motion serves clarity.
motion-design-language.scroll-reveal: Single fade-in. No stagger, no y-translation. Applied via IntersectionObserver at module level.
motion-design-language.parallax: Gentle background shift — the hero image drifts down ~150px over a full page scroll. Implemented with requestAnimationFrame for GPU-composited performance.
motion-design-language.hover: Images scale up slightly (1.02–1.05x) on hover. Cards lift with shadow. Both use CSS transitions (0.5–0.7s ease).
motion-design-language.nav: Background crossfades from transparent to frosted white (`bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-md`) after 400px. The brand mark fades in simultaneously.
motion-design-language.mobile-menu: Slides in from the right with a 0.3s ease-out curve. The backdrop scrim uses no animation — it appears instantly for a snappy feel.
motion-design-language.timeline: Static on mobile (hidden line). On desktop, the gold gradient line provides a sense of vertical journey without animation.
